column1: # Domain 5 - Enterprise Active Directory Penetration Testing & Security Auditing
# Phase F - Safe Purple Team Validation
# This normalized dataset serves as the master record for every authorized Purple
# Team validation activity conducted during the Active Directory security assessment.
# Each record represents one controlled validation scenario executed to verify
# The dataset provides traceability between attack simulations
# • All timestamps should use ISO-8601 format.
# • ATT&CK mappings should reference official Technique IDs.
# • Evidence IDs must reference the Evidence Register.
